channel.title: MCP on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in MCP on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Cosmos DB Shell—your new command line for data workflows
item.description:
Azure Cosmos DB Shell is in public preview. It adds a command-line interface for querying, exploring, and managing Cosmos DB data, with agentic capabilities powered by Model Context Protocol (MCP).

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Secret scanning with GitHub MCP Server is now generally available
item.description:
GitHub secret scanning in the GitHub MCP server is now generally available. It can be used with MCP-compatible AI coding agents or IDEs, including GitHub Copilot CLI.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: dotnet: Governing MCP tool calls in .NET with the Agent Governance Toolkit
item.description:
The post describes how to govern MCP tool calls in .NET using the Agent Governance Toolkit. It focuses on policy-based access control, security scanning, and response sanitization to reduce risk in AI agent systems.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Functions now supports MCP resource triggers
item.description:
Azure Functions now generally supports MCP resource triggers for MCP servers hosted on Functions. This lets developers expose resources directly, in addition to tools.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: SQL MCP Server
item.description:
Azure announced a public preview of SQL MCP Server, an MCP connector for production databases. It is part of Data API Builder and is intended to provide a simple, predictable, and secure way to connect AI agents to data workflows.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Figma MCP server can now generate design layers from VS Code
item.description:
GitHub Copilot in VS Code can now connect to the Figma MCP server to use Figma design context while coding and to export rendered UI back to Figma as editable frames.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: dotnet: Release v1.0 of the official MCP C# SDK
item.description:
MCP C# SDK v1.0 focuses on improved authorization handling, expanded metadata support, and added patterns for tool calling and long-running operations.

  • Source: .NET
